title: Phase 12A: Universal search - service, API, command palette
description: Build universal search: search service querying across all entities (orders, invoices, POs, customers, products, trucks, etc.), search API route, and enhanced command palette with recent items, pinned records, and quick actions.
steps: Implement search across: orders, customers, products, trucks, POs, invoices, receiving records
Return typed results with entity type, title, subtitle, and link
Implement relevance ranking and fuzzy matching
Create src/app/api/search/route.ts with search API endpoint
Enhance src/components/shared/search-command.tsx (from Phase 1) with full functionality
Implement recent items persistence, pinned records, and quick action shortcuts
